calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jul-19-2010 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jul-19-2010 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Prove-Up Hearing.
Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

Martin Hoffman, Esq. appeared for plaintiff American Express Bank, FSB.
No appearance by defendant Saina Avrutina, a/k/a Faina Avrutina.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on April 1, 2010.
Doe defendants were dismissed today, July 19, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff American Express Bank, FSB, and against defendant Saina Avrutina, a/k/a Faina Avrutina as follows:

Principal - $13,966.51.
Interest - $1,223.62.
Attorney Fees - Waived.
Costs - $399.50.

Total - $15,589.63.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-01-2010 Set For Trial On Jul-19-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
